series_metadata.series_description: All documents regarding requests allowing agency to establish or increase appropriation authority in special funds. These would include, but are not limited to, Controlling Board submission forms, testimony, written responses to questions from board members, and similar documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: state audits has been conducted, reports release, and all discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: state audits has been conducted, reports release, and all discrepancies resolved
